validated_commands.format: python3 -m uv run black . && python3 -m uv run isort .
validated_commands.notes: uv is not on PATH in CI; use 'pip install uv --break-system-packages' then 'python3 -m uv'

yaml_pollution_note: Running tests with --cov causes PyYAML global state corruption from some earlier test. Affects parse_skill_file and parse_primitive_file calls when run in full suite with coverage. Not a new issue. Tests pass without --cov.
ansi_strip_note: 7 ANSI failures fully resolved as of 2026-03-16 (likely fixed in or around PR #313). No longer a concern.

testing_backlog.notes: STATUS_SYMBOLS verified, uncovered edge cases in _rich_echo, _rich_error, _rich_warning fallback paths. console.py:15-20, 27-30, 63-65, 86-106, 137-145.
PR created 2026-03-17: test-assist/command-helpers-coverage-1773710009. Remaining uncovered: lazy import fallbacks, print_version, _auto_detect functions.
PR #221 open. Remaining uncovered: display/formatting paths (264-333, 436-518, 759-801) - require distributed compiler stack
Branch test-assist/core-operations-runtime-manager-coverage exists - may have open PR
Branch test-assist/registry-operations-coverage exists - may have open PR. Heavy network dependency.
Lines 205-220 (Rich fallback rendering) still uncovered. Requires mocking Rich imports - complexity not worth it.

completed_work.description: Added 30 tests for commands/_helpers.py. Coverage: 59%->80% (+21pp). Full suite: 1938 passing (up from 1908).
Added 12 tests for security scanner and audit command. content_scanner.py: 91%->100%, audit.py: 92%->96%. ANSI failures confirmed resolved (0 failures, 1868 passing).
Updated testing backlog: identified commands/_helpers.py (59%) as high-value target. Updated coverage baseline.
Fixed 7 failing tests by adding _strip_ansi() helper. ANSI issues ultimately resolved without this PR.
Added 34 unit tests for agents_compiler.py (65%->82%). PR #221 still open.
